preamble: The retraction of the voiceless alveolar affricate [ts] to the voiceless retroflex affricate [ʈʂ]. This shift is a hallmark of the development of Northern Chinese dialects and Mandarin.

examples.note: Systematic retraction of sibilants before certain historical medials.

sources: Pulleyblank, E. G. (1984). Middle Chinese: A Study in Historical Phonology.
